## Parent
Reference: PORTFOLIO_V2_PRD.md

## What to build
Implement responsive design for all screen sizes (desktop, tablet, mobile) with appropriate breakpoints and touch-friendly interactions.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Breakpoints defined in theme CSS:
  - Mobile: < 768px
  - Tablet: 768px - 1024px
  - Desktop: > 1024px
- [ ] ProjectGrid responsive:
  - Desktop: 3 columns
  - Tablet: 2 columns
  - Mobile: 1 column
- [ ] TagFilter responsive:
  - Desktop: Horizontal row
  - Mobile: Wrap to multiple lines
- [ ] Hero section responsive:
  - Font sizes adjust for mobile
  - Padding/margins adjust
- [ ] Skills grid responsive:
  - Columns adjust based on screen size
- [ ] Modal responsive:
  - Full screen on mobile
  - Centered with max-width on desktop
- [ ] Touch interactions optimized:
  - Touch targets minimum 44x44px
  - No hover-only functionality
- [ ] Navigation usable without mouse
- [ ] All components tested at all breakpoints

## Blocked by
Issue #008 (All Projects Display)
